description.en: You ask for the guidance of supernatural entities, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.
description.ru: You ask for the guidance of supernatural entities, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

description.en: The spell has a range of touch.
description.ru: The spell has a range of touch.

description.en: The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.
description.ru: The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

description.en: You disperse vital energy in a 30-foot emanation. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.
description.ru: You disperse vital energy in a 30-foot emanation. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

description.en: The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.
description.ru: The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

description.en: The target's skin becomes tough, with a consistency like bark or wood. The target gains resistance 2 to bludgeoning and piercing damage and weakness 3 to fire. After the target takes fire damage, it can Dismiss the spell as a free action triggered by taking the damage; doing so doesn't reduce the fire damage the target was dealt.
description.ru: Кожа цели становится крепкой, словно кора или древесина. Цель получает устойчивость 2 к дробящему и колющему урону и уязвимость 3 к огню. После того как цель получает урон огнём, она может использовать Прекращение для этого заклинания в качестве свободного действия, спровоцированного уроном огнём, но это не снизит полученный урон огнём.

description.en: The resistances increase by 2, and the weakness increases by 3.
description.ru: Устойчивости увеличиваются на 2, уязвимость увеличивается на 3.
